/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Kaffeine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Kaffeine.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kaffeine.dir/src/app/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kaffeine.dir/src/app/tray_icon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Kaffeine.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_assets.cpp.o -o Kaffeine  /usr/lib64/libKF6StatusNotifierItem.so.6.26.0 /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
